query:
SELECT 
  100000 as initialCapital,
  (SELECT SUM(allocatedCapital) FROM paperPositions WHERE userId = 1 AND status = 'open') as deployed,
  (SELECT SUM(allocatedCapital + realizedPnl) FROM paperTrades WHERE userId = 1 AND sessionId = 22) as proceeds,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM paperTrades WHERE userId = 1 AND sessionId = 22) * 5.00 as closedComm,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM paperPositions WHERE userId = 1 AND status = 'open') * 2.50 as openComm,
  100000 
    - (SELECT SUM(allocatedCapital) FROM paperPositions WHERE userId = 1 AND status = 'open')
    + (SELECT SUM(allocatedCapital + realizedPnl) FROM paperTrades WHERE userId = 1 AND sessionId = 22)
    - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM paperTrades WHERE userId = 1 AND sessionId = 22) * 5.00
    - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM paperPositions WHERE userId = 1 AND status = 'open') * 2.50
  as correctCash;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2fRMU9WuDe4UzGh.6d94b4c6929d --database MmWmJbH77mYYXTZazVYpbM --execute 
SELECT 
  100000 as initialCapital,
  (SELECT SUM(allocatedCapital) FROM paperPositions WHERE userId = 1 AND status = 'open') as deployed,
  (SELECT SUM(allocatedCapital + realizedPnl) FROM paperTrades WHERE userId = 1 AND sessionId = 22) as proceeds,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM paperTrades WHERE userId = 1 AND sessionId = 22) * 5.00 as closedComm,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM paperPositions WHERE userId = 1 AND status = 'open') * 2.50 as openComm,
  100000 
    - (SELECT SUM(allocatedCapital) FROM paperPositions WHERE userId = 1 AND status = 'open')
    + (SELECT SUM(allocatedCapital + realizedPnl) FROM paperTrades WHERE userId = 1 AND sessionId = 22)
    - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM paperTrades WHERE userId = 1 AND sessionId = 22) * 5.00
    - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM paperPositions WHERE userId = 1 AND status = 'open') * 2.50
  as correctCash;
